title: Leech Group
description: Premium WZML-X Leeching service. Effortlessly upload Torrents, YouTube videos, and direct links from hundreds of supported websites directly to Telegram.

title: Leech Dump
description: The central repository for all processed content. Access every file successfully uploaded and mirrored by our leeching system in one organized channel.

title: Save Restricted Content
description: Unlock restricted media. Our advanced bot bypasses Telegram's forwarding and saving restrictions, allowing you to secure content from any locked channel.

title: Rename Bot
description: A versatile file management tool. Instantly rename files, convert videos to documents (and vice versa), and generate professional video snapshots.

title: Video Compressor
description: Smart video optimization. Compress and transcode videos into multiple resolutions (720p, 480p, 360p) to save data while maintaining quality.

title: Bypass Group

title: Change Thumbnail

title: File Store Bot
description: Create your own digital storefront. Securely store files and generate custom share links with integrated buttons and shortener support.
